text: chatgpt wrote my cover letter and i got the job. am i the imposter or is it
my roomba has mapped my entire apartment and i havent even explored the closet yet
tried a social media detox lasted 4 hours then checked instagram on my laptop instead
alexa played funeral music when i asked for the weather. should i be worried
my screen time report said 11 hours and honestly thats a good day for me
ai is gonna take my job but jokes on them i wasnt doing it anyway
called tech support and got transferred 7 times. pretty sure i talked to the same guy twice
my smart fridge is judging me for the 3am cheese runs i can feel it
reset my password so many times the security question is now existential
the algorithm thinks im pregnant, a bodybuilder, and 67 years old simultaneously
windows updated in the middle of my presentation. the robot uprising has begun
deleted tiktok then downloaded it again 20 mins later. rock bottom is an app store
my smart lock updated and locked me out of my own house for 3 hours
i talk to siri more than i talk to my family and siri doesnt even like me
put my phone down for 5 min and had a panic attack. this is fine
ai art generator gave me 6 fingers and honestly thats more than i deserve
my thermostat and my wife are in a cold war. thermostat is winning
spent 40 min on a captcha proving im not a robot. maybe i am one??
the youtube algorithm knows me better than my therapist and charges less
told myself id learn to code but here i am asking chatgpt to do it
my smart speaker randomly laughed at 2am. i sleep in the car now
software update bricked my printer again. gonna start writing letters by hand
i have 47 tabs open and no idea whats playing music
my phone autocorrected my bosss name to 'satan' and i didnt catch it in time
tried digital detox camp. they had wifi. i found it in 11 minutes
password must contain uppercase lowercase number symbol and a blood sacrifice apparently
the robots wont take over theyll just make us fill out more forms first
my fitbit congratulated me for steps i took to the fridge. thanks buddy
alexa ordered 40 lbs of cat food because my cat meowed near it
i said ok google in my sleep and apparently ordered a trampoline
been in a password reset loop for 3 days. this is my life now
my phone battery dies at 23% now. we're both getting old i guess
ai gonna replace writers but can it stare at a blank page for 6 hours? didnt think so
smart home turned off all lights when i said goodnight to my date. thanks google
tech support told me to restart it. bro i restarted it before i was born
my screen time went down this week only bc my phone was dead for 2 days
the algorithm put me in straight tiktok and i dont even know who i am anymore
tried to quit twitter 8 times. elon keeps pulling me back somehow
my robot vacuum ate my charger cable. the machines are evolving
asked ai to write my wedding vows. it was better than what i had tbh
zoom updated mid-meeting and everyone saw my desktop wallpaper. it was shrek
i use face id and my phone unlocked for my sister. existential crisis activated
social media detox day 1: does texting count? what about discord? asking for me
my smart tv knows i rewatched the office 14 times. no judgement pls
ai took my graphic design job so now i critique ai art. circle of life
forgot my apple id password and now i basically own a very expensive brick
my phone suggested i go outside based on my location history. it was right
printer says low ink but i printed like 3 pages in 2 years. where did it go
siri called my ex when i said 'call no one'. the betrayal is real
tried using ai to meal plan and it gave me recipes with ingredients that dont exist
my nest cam caught me eating cereal at 3am and sent an alert to my wife
every app wants to send me notifications like im not already overwhelmed karen
the robot apocalypse wont be dramatic itll just be infinite software updates
my smart watch told me to breathe. if i need a reminder for that its over
chatgpt apologized to me more than any ex ever did
i have 200+ unread emails and at this point theyre someone elses problem
tech support asked if i tried clearing my cache like bro i cant even clear my mind
my smart plug turned off my cpap machine at 4am. attempted murder by iot
screen time limit hit and i just entered the passcode to override it. self control who
the wifi went down for 10 min and my family made eye contact. horrifying
ai wrote my resignation letter and it was too polite. had to add some spite manually
my google home and alexa are beefing and i dont know whose side to take
accidentally liked my crush's post from 2019 while stalking. phone is now in the river
software update added features nobody asked for and removed the one i used
i set up 2FA and now logging in feels like defusing a bomb every time
my car's touchscreen froze and i couldnt change the ac. drove home in a sauna
ai customer service chatbot told me to contact customer service. full circle moment
i doomscroll for 2 hrs then complain i have no free time. makes sense
my smart doorbell recognized the delivery guy before i did. he waves at it now
tried to cancel a subscription and they made me talk to a human. cruel punishment
copilot wrote my code and now i cant explain it in the code review help
phone died at 1% right when i found the perfect parking spot. no proof it happened
my roomba named itself in the app and i respect its autonomy honestly
spent 3 hours fixing a bug that was a missing semicolon. i am the bug
deleted facebook in 2020 made a new one in 2021 im part of the problem
my alexa timer went off during a zoom call and everyone heard me say 'pizza time'
the machines dont need to revolt they already control my sleep schedule via tiktok
asked chatgpt if it would replace me and it said 'not yet' which is terrifying
my phone screen has more cracks than my life plan and thats saying something
smart home went offline so i had to flip a light switch like a peasant
i pay for 6 streaming services and still end up watching youtube
autocorrect changed my clients name in every email. 47 emails. forty seven
my phone suggested 'u up?' as a quick reply to my mom. apple knows too much
tried to explain the cloud to my dad and now he thinks his files are in the sky
ai is coming for everyones jobs but tech support will survive bc nothing ever works
my smart scale connected to my phone and now my weight loss journey has witnesses
google maps rerouted me through a field once. i trusted it. i drove into the field
turned off read receipts so ppl think im busy but im just avoiding everyone
my laptop fan sounds like a jet engine when i open chrome. 3 tabs is too many apparently
the robot uprising already happened we just call them 'mandatory software updates'
phone fell in the toilet and the rice trick didnt work but the rice was delicious
i use incognito mode to google things im too embarrassed to have in my history
smart fridge texted me that the door was open. i was standing right there
set a 1hr screen time limit for instagram. been overriding it daily for 8 months
my bluetooth speaker connected to my neighbors phone. we have similar taste actually
asked ai for life advice and it told me to drink water and go outside. $20/month for this
tech support put me on hold so long i forgot what was broken
my car updated overnight and moved all the buttons. nearly crashed finding the wipers
i screenshot every password and store them in my camera roll. security expert btw
the ai apocalypse wont be terminators itll be chatbots gaslighting us politely
